name: PandaDoc
description: Drive PandaDoc (proposals + e-signature) from any AI agent: documents, templates, contacts, recipients, sending for signature, status tracking. 10 tools, API-key auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the PandaDoc API v1 (developers.pandadoc.com).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://app.pandadoc.com → top-right avatar → **API → API Key**.
2. Use the **Production API Key** (or **Sandbox** for testing). The key format is `<long-string>`.
3. Set `PANDADOC_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: API-Key ${PANDADOC_API_KEY}` — literal `API-Key ` prefix, NOT `Bearer`. Adapter handles via API_KEY profile.

**Document workflow**:
  1. Create document from template (`pandadoc_create_document`) — fills template variables with `tokens` and pricing tables, sets recipients.
  2. Wait for document.status = 'document.draft' (initial state).
  3. Send for signature (`pandadoc_send_document`).
  4. Recipients receive emails; poll `pandadoc_get_document_status` to track signing.
  5. When all signed, status = 'document.completed' and you can download via `pandadoc_download_document`.

**Templates**: build the visual template in PandaDoc UI; access via `pandadoc_list_templates` to get template_id. Templates have `tokens` (placeholders), `fields` (form inputs filled by recipients), `pricing_tables`, and roles (named recipient slots like 'Client', 'Vendor').

**Status values**: document.draft, document.sent, document.viewed, document.waiting_approval, document.approved, document.rejected, document.completed, document.expired, document.declined, document.voided.

**Pagination**: `?page=N&count=M` (max 100). Headers include X-Total-Count.

**Rate limits**: 100 req/min per API key. On 429 back off.

**Out of scope here**: webhooks management, OAuth (for multi-tenant apps), in-app branding, payment forms config.

tools.name: pandadoc_list_documents
tools.description: List documents in the workspace, with filters.

template_id.description: Only docs created from this template.

order_by.description: name, date_created, date_modified. Prefix with - for desc.

tools.name: pandadoc_create_document
tools.description: Create a document from a template. Required: name + template_uuid + recipients (with email + first_name + last_name + role). Tokens fill template placeholders. Pricing tables for line-item docs.

recipients.description: [{email, first_name, last_name, role:'Client'|'Vendor'|..., signing_order?:N}]. role matches a template role.

fields.description: {field_name:{value, role?}} — fills form fields in template.

tools.name: pandadoc_get_document_status
tools.description: Quick status check for a document. Returns id, status, expiration_date.

tools.name: pandadoc_get_document_details
tools.description: Fetch document full details — recipients with signing status, tokens, fields, pricing data, attachments.

tools.name: pandadoc_send_document
tools.description: Send the document for signing/review. Required: documentId. Optional: subject + message (the email content recipients receive).

silent.description: If true, skip recipient notification emails (you handle communication yourself).

tools.name: pandadoc_download_document
tools.description: Download the finalized PDF of a document. Returns binary PDF (the engine returns it as the response body — handle it as a file).

tools.name: pandadoc_list_templates
tools.description: List templates available in the workspace. Required to know which template_uuid to pass to create_document.

tools.name: pandadoc_get_template_details
tools.description: Fetch a template's full structure: roles[], tokens[], fields[], pricing_tables, content. Required to know what tokens/fields to fill when creating a document.

tools.name: pandadoc_list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts in the workspace (saved recipients).
